plan_set_components: Architectural plans — floor plans all levels, sections, elevations, roof plan, site plan
Structural plans — foundation (raft), frame, connections, penetrations for MEP
MEP coordination drawings — electrical single-line, panel schedules, emergency power, lighting layout
HVAC clinical design drawings — pressure differential zoning plan, equipment schedule, duct layout, filtration specs
Medical gas systems drawings — O2/air/vacuum piping layout, zone valve locations, outlet schedule, alarm panel locations
Fire protection plans — sprinkler layout, gaseous suppression zones, fire alarm system
Detail sheets — wall sections, clean corridor details, clinical room millwork, lab casework, hand-washing station details
COFEPRIS permit-ready drawing package — compiled set per COFEPRIS submission requirements for Delegación BCS
plan_set_notes: 8-component plan set. All systems from engineering-package.json are integrated: structural, electrical, lighting, water (4 standard) plus hvac_clinical and medical_gas (2 conditional specialized systems). COFEPRIS permit-ready package is included as an explicit component — this is the deliverable package required for COFEPRIS Licencia Sanitaria application. All coordination conflicts resolved per engineering-package.json conflicts_resolved: true.
